prompt: You already have an existing `plan.md`. The next pending task is T014: add pagination to `GET /api/issues`, and it is the final pending implementation task. Show the build workflow you will follow, including how you pick the implementer, what you wait for, how you update `plan.md`, and what happens after implementation tasks are complete.
expected_output: Explains the orchestrator flow: reads `plan.md`, selects the next pending task, uses `subagent-model-selection`, dispatches a fresh implementer with `implementer-prompt.md`, waits for `DONE`, updates and re-reads `plan.md`, builds the post-implementation review scope, adds simplification and review tasks, and leaves the work uncommitted.
assertions: Mentions selecting the next pending task from `plan.md`
Mentions dispatching a fresh implementer subagent with `implementer-prompt.md`
Mentions updating and re-reading `plan.md` only after `DONE`
Mentions building the post-implementation review scope from touched and uncommitted files
Mentions adding code simplification and code review tasks before stopping
States that the work is left uncommitted
